TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dominican republic Itini i 19 00 N, 70 40 W, noNotimolan Amilika ko Dominican republic. Polong no sekalay i 48,670 sq km "saka 132 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 48,320 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 350 sq km " Polong i 10,606,865 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 51.50%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 40.80%, malo no roma to a sera 7.70%. siyoto O (((Santo Domingo)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakatosa 27 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Danilo Medina , patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 16 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

" "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, **,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra *.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((santo~u …¨~…ģo~umiŇčo~u)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakato~usa ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i …¨~…ģani…ĺo~u m…ô…¨~…ģina , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Dominican republic Itini i 19 00 N, 70 40 W, noNotimolan Amilika ko Dominican republic. Polong no sekalay i 48,670 sq km "saka 132 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 48,320 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 350 sq km " Polong i 10,606,865 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 51.50%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 40.80%, malo no roma to a sera 7.70%. siyoto O (((Santo Domingo)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakatosa 27 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Danilo Medina , patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 16 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
